creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: kwm
Date: Sun May 18 13:06:27 2014
New Revision: 354416
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/354416
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r354416/

Log:
  Switch to USES=libtool:keepla instead of plain USES=libtool.
  
  Fixes:
  editors/abiword: libtool: link: cannot find the library
  `/usr/local/lib/libgoffice-0.8.la' or unhandled argument
  `/usr/local/lib/libgoffice-0.8.la'
  
  PR:		ports/189909
  Submitted by:	"O. Hartmann" <ohartman@zedat.fu-berlin.de>

Modified:
  head/devel/goffice/Makefile
  head/devel/goffice/pkg-plist

Modified: head/devel/goffice/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/goffice/Makefile	Sun May 18 12:59:36 2014	(r354415)
+++ head/devel/goffice/Makefile	Sun May 18 13:06:27 2014	(r354416)
@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	goffice
 PORTVERSION=	0.8.17
-PORTREVISION=	6
+PORTREVISION=	7
 CATEGORIES=	devel gnome
 MASTER_SITES=	GNOME
 PKGNAMESUFFIX=	08
@@ -19,7 +19,7 @@ PORTSCOUT=	ignore
 
 LIB_DEPENDS=	libpcre.so:${PORTSDIR}/devel/pcre
 
-USES=		gettext gmake libtool pathfix pkgconfig tar:xz
+USES=		gettext gmake libtool:keepla pathfix pkgconfig tar:xz
 USE_GNOME=	gnomeprefix intlhack gtk20 libgsf
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes

Modified: head/devel/goffice/pkg-plist
==============================================================================

+++ head/devel/goffice/pkg-plist	Sun May 18 13:06:27 2014	(r354416)
